reasons.cooling: Phase change technology - cool-to-the-touch fabrics that adjust to temperature
reasons.pressureRelief: Talalay latex for natural and durable pressure-relieving comfot layer that confirms to your body. It is breathable,antimicrobial, and hypo-allegenic
reasons.support: Hand-tufted, and QUANTUM ENCASED COIL UNIT provides dynamically responsive, durable support with 1575 individually encased 17 gauge coils.
reasons.medium: Perfect medium feel for most sleepers
reasons.default: Ultra premium hand-tufted hybrid with multiple specialty foams and a lifetime warranty
